1440, 2392], "visibility": "visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 0, 1440, 1887], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Baby pyramids are perfect developing toys for babies and toddlers of all ages!

Your little one will surely like the bright rainbow rings - plastic, textile, wooden, rubber, etc.

Just thread the rings on a long lace and hang it next to the baby face. Viewing the garland can entertain the baby for a long!

You can also use the pyramid ring when you lay the little one on tummy - just place them next to him/her and offer to explore. 

Make photos of your baby viewing bright colored pyramids, upload to the App. Write about his/her reactions.

false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [56, 1162, 226, 1224], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Baby pyramids are perfect developing toys for babies and toddlers of all ages!

Your little one will surely like the bright rainbow rings - plastic, textile, wooden, rubber, etc.

Just thread the rings on a long lace and hang it next to the baby face. Viewing the garland can entertain the baby for a long!

You can also use the pyramid ring when you lay the little one on tummy - just place them next to him/her and offer to explore. 

Make photos of your baby viewing bright colored pyramids, upload to the App. Write about his/her reactions.
